name: View.ViewAttributes
summary: The ViewAttributes class contains the attributes for the view.

constructors.name: View.ViewAttributes
constructors.summary: Creates a new view attributes instance that loads standard attributes.

constructors.name: View.ViewAttributes
constructors.summary: Creates a new view attributes instance that loads the specified attributes.

params.name: AttributesFile
params.doc: The name of the attributes file.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

params.name: ObjectToCompare
params.doc: The object to be used for comparing.

returns.doc: True if all the fields (except for the database GUID) of the objects match.

methods.name: LoadAttributes
methods.summary: Loads the attributes from the attribute file.

returns.doc: True if the attributes are loaded correctly. False if the attribute file loading failed.

properties.name: DatumLevel
properties.summary: The specified datum level. If ViewPlaneDatumPointForElevations is set to true when DatumLevel is set, the value of ViewPlaneDatumPointForElevations will change to false.

properties.name: FixedViewPlacing
properties.summary: Defines whether the view placing is fixed (true) or free (false).

properties.name: LabelPositionHorizontal
properties.summary: The horizontal position of the view label.

properties.name: LabelPositionVertical
properties.summary: The vertical position of the view label.

properties.name: LocationBy
properties.summary: Gets or sets the location by attribute. Value is ViewAttributes.LocationByModelOrigin, ViewAttributes.LocationByProjectBasePoint or guid of a Basepoint.

properties.name: MarkSymbolAttributes
properties.summary: The view mark symbol attributes.

properties.name: MarkSymbolColor
properties.summary: The color of the mark symbol (see DrawingColors for options).

properties.name: PartialProfileLength
properties.summary: Gets or sets the partial profile length.

properties.name: PartialProfileOffset
properties.summary: Gets or sets the partial profile offset

properties.name: PourView
properties.summary: Defines whether the view is pour view or not.

properties.name: ReflectedView
properties.summary: Defines whether the view is reflected or not.

properties.name: Scale
properties.summary: The view scale.

properties.name: Shortening
properties.summary: Gets or sets the shortening attributes for the view.

properties.name: ShowPartOpeningsOrRecessSymbol
properties.summary: Defines whether to show the openings/recess symbol or not.

properties.name: TagsAttributes
properties.summary: The attributes for view mark tags.

properties.name: TrueMarkSymbolColor
properties.summary: The true color (rgb enabled) of the mark symbol.

properties.name: UndeformedView
properties.summary: Defines whether the view is undeformed or not.

properties.name: UnfoldedView
properties.summary: Defines whether the view is unfolded or not.

properties.name: ViewExtensionForNeighbourParts
properties.summary: The view extension for neighbour parts.

properties.name: ViewPlaneDatumPointForElevations
properties.summary: Defines whether the datum point for elevations is view plane based (true) or specified (false). When set to false, the value of DatumLevel is used. When set to true, DatumLevel will be set to 0.0.
